description.value:
[3 actions] Archetype, Cold, Concentrate, Occult

You channel the absolute zero of death itself outward in a devastating explosion of soul-cold. All creatures within a 30-foot burst centered on you must attempt a Fortitude save (DC 10 + your level + your Charisma modifier).

ResultEffect
Critical SuccessNo effect
SuccessHalf damage (6d8 cold + 6d8 negative)
FailureFull damage (6d8 cold + 6d8 negative) and Paralyzed for 1 round
Critical FailureDouble damage, Paralyzed for 1 minute, and persistent cold damage 2d6

You can use Underworld Frost once per combat encounter.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
